text: Iran says it targeted sites in Kuwait, Bahrain and Qatar after the wave of U.S. strikes (about 90 targets, including air defense systems, coastal surveillance assets, and missile and drone storage sites)

MAP OF THE DAY: The South Asian monsoon has now fully covered India (about 3-4 days later than normal). The seasonal rains remain below average, but the gap has narrowed to -15% from -35% a few weeks ago. Next few weeks critical for crops and energy demand. https://t.co/hSSwd9Imfr

US military claims it has facilitated the transit of 380 million barrels of oil via the Strait of Hormuz since early May. 

(My math: If counting the whole of May, June and the first nine days of July, that would equal to ~5.4 million barrels a day)
quoted_text:
🚫 CLAIM: Iranian state media claims that transit through the Strait of Hormuz is only permitted through routes designated by Iran. 

✅ TRUTH: Iran does not control the Strait of Hormuz. Since early May, U.S. forces have helped facilitate the successful transit of more than 800 commercial vessels and 380 million barrels of crude oil through the vital international trade corridor.
